---
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
    html_document:
        theme: cerulean
        toc: true
        number_sections: false
        toc_float: true
toc_collapsed: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
params:
  pactName: "PACT-22-##"
  userName: "Jonathan Serrano"
  workDir: "/Volumes/CBioinformatics/jonathan/pact/consensus"
---

```{r, label='PACTNameInput', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE}
# Input Parameters
#args = commandArgs(TRUE)
#pactName = args[1]
pactName <- params$pactName
userName <- params$userName
workDir <-  params$workDir # working Knit directory
# To this Knit directory RMD, copy: 
#"_MethylMatch.xlsx","-QC.tsv","-SampleSheet.csv", and all ".FACETS.cnv.plot.pdf" files
outDir <- file.path(workDir, paste0(pactName,"_consensus"))
message("Now Knitting ", pactName, ".html")
```

---
title: "Consensus `r pactName`"
author: "`r userName`"
---

<style>
.main-container {margin-left: 0;margin-right: 0;}
.tab-content{width: 60%; min-width: 1200px;}
</style>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
if(!require("librarian")){install.packages("librarian", dependencies=T, verbose=T, Ncpus = 6, quiet=T)}
pkgs <- c("animation","tidyverse","knitr","kableExtra","readr","ggplot2","data.table","plotly","DT","pdftools", "htmltools")
librarian::shelf(pkgs, ask=F)
animation::ani.options(autobrowse = FALSE); options(width=1400)
```

<span style="background-color:lightgreen;">PASS</span>  

```{r, label='Input Data', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE}
pngDir <- "/Volumes/molecular/Molecular/MethylationClassifier/CNV_PNG"
philipsFtp <- "/Volumes/molecular/Molecular/Philips_SFTP"
methSheet <- paste0(pactName,"_MethylMatch.xlsx")
qcTsv <- paste0(pactName,"-QC.tsv") #tsv or txt
descrip <- paste0(pactName,"_desc.csv")
```

```{r, label='Read in Data', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
critialMnts <- c("/Volumes/CBioinformatics/Methylation", "/Volumes/molecular/MOLECULAR LAB ONLY")

checkMounts <- function(critialMnts){
    failMount <- lapply(critialMnts, function(driveMount){ifelse(!dir.exists(driveMount),return(T),return(F))})
    if(any(failMount==T)){
        toFix <- paste(critialMnts[which(failMount==T)])
        cat("PATH does not exist, ensure drive is mounted:", toFix,"\n")
        stopifnot(!any(failMount==T))}
}

checkMounts(critialMnts)

if(!dir.exists(outDir)){dir.create(outDir)}
sysCmd <- paste("cd", outDir)
system(sysCmd)
setwd(outDir)
samsheet <- list.files(pattern = "-SampleSheet.csv", all.files = T)[1]
stopifnot(file.exists(samsheet) & file.exists(methSheet))
stopifnot(file.exists(qcTsv))
if(!file.exists(descrip)){
  warning(paste("You must create/name your description file as:", descrip, "\nFile must be in same directory as Rmd:",getwd()))
}
stopifnot(file.exists(descrip))
stopifnot(dir.exists(pngDir) & dir.exists(philipsFtp)) # checks if drive mounted to cnv png methylation
methData <- as.data.frame(readxl::read_excel(methSheet))
methData <- methData[methData$report_complete=="YES",]
methSams <- methData$Test_Number
samList <- read.csv(samsheet,skip=19)[, c("Test_Number","Specimen_ID","Tumor_Content")] 
samples <- unique(samList$Test_Number)
samples <- samples[samples!=0]
sampleRows <- c(1:length(samples)) # if you have half part change to 1:8 or 32 etc
qcData <- read.delim(file=qcTsv)
row.names(qcData)<-qcData$Row
snvDt <- read.csv(file=descrip)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
# Init Step to make sure that the dependencies are loaded
htmltools::tagList(DT::datatable(cars, options=list(pageLength = 15, width="100%")))
htmltools::tagList(plotly::ggplotly(ggplot2::ggplot()))
```

```{r, label='PNG Output', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', error=FALSE, fig.keep='all', include=TRUE, fig.align="center", fig.cap="CNV plot", fig.show="asis", out.width = '140%', include=FALSE, fig.width=15}
library("kableExtra")

qcHeader <- c("Mapped Reads QC", "Deduplicated Reads QC", "Targets with <50 Coverage", "Avg and Median Coverage", "Overlapped HOMO SNP")

# Prints out the table tab headings and tab information based on object parameters provided
makeDT <- function(tabNam, objDat, pdfFi=NULL, rdNumb=NULL, sam=NULL){
  cat(paste0("## **", tabNam,"** \n\n"))
  if(!is.null(pdfFi)){
    pdfFi <- file.path(outDir,"cnvpng",paste0(pdfFi,".png"))
    altTxt <- paste0("![CNV Plot](", pdfFi, "){width=100%}")
    cat(altTxt)
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  if(!is.null(rdNumb)){
    cnvFi <- file.path(pngDir, paste0(rdNumb,"_cnv.png"))
    altTxt <- paste0("![Methylation ", rdNumb, " ", sam, " CNV Plot](", cnvFi, "){width=120%}")
    cat(altTxt)
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  if(!is.null(objDat)){
    toFilter <- list(position = 'top', clear = FALSE, plain = TRUE)
    if(tabNam=="QC"){
     colnames(objDat) <- qcHeader
    newTa <- knitr::kable(objDat, row.names=F, "html")
    newTa <- kableExtra::kable_styling(newTa, bootstrap_options = c("striped","condensed"), full_width = F, position="left") 
    newTa <- kableExtra::column_spec(newTa, 1:5, width = "4cm")
    print(newTa)
    }else{
      print(htmltools::tagList(
        DT::datatable(objDat, height = "100%", filter = toFilter, options=list(
          scrollX = F, info = F, autoWidth = T, pageLength = 15, rownames=F, lengthChange = T, searchable = T))))
    }
    }
}

# Converts Varshini PDF cnv facets to PNG format renamed as NGS name
convert.plots <- function(samLi) {
  pdfList <- dir(pattern = "*.pdf")
  if(length(pdfList)!=length(sampleRows)){
    warning("Number of sample rows ", length(sampleRows), " does not equal length of pdf files: ", length(pdfList))
    print(pdfList)
    }
  tumors <- samLi[samLi$Tumor_Content != 0 & samLi$Specimen_ID != "SC", ]
  row.names(tumors)<- 1:nrow(tumors)
  ngsOrder = which(sapply(tumors$Specimen_ID, grepl, pdfList), arr.ind = T)[, "row"]
  if(!dir.exists(file.path(outDir, "cnvpng"))){dir.create(path = file.path(outDir, "cnvpng"))}
  invisible(lapply(X=1:length(ngsOrder), FUN=function(X){
    pngName <- paste0(tumors$Test_Number[X], ".png")
    pdfFile <- pdfList[ngsOrder[X]]
    suppressWarnings(pdftools::pdf_convert(pdfFile, filenames = file.path("cnvpng", pngName), dpi=200))
  }))
}

# Parses the philips CNV abberations export from Philips dump csv file
parsePhilipsCn <- function(cnvInfo,sam,cnvTab){
  cnvInfo$Test_Case <- sam
  cnvInfo$Variant <- "CNV"
  cnvInfo$Mutation.Type <- cnvInfo$AberrationType
  cnvInfo$Other <- cnvInfo$Chrom
  cnvInfo$Comments <- substr(cnvInfo$CopyNumber,1,3)
  cnvInfo$In.NYU <- cnvInfo$In.Philips <- NA
  cnvInfo$IGV <- "Copy Number"
  newTab <- cnvInfo[,names(cnvTab)]
  newTab <- rbind(cnvTab,newTab)
  cnvTab <- newTab
  dropMut <- cnvTab$Mutation.Type!="Hemizygous Loss"
  return(cnvTab[dropMut,])
}

# Appends any additional cnv abberations from data dump
checkDataDump <- function(sam,cnvTab){
  samZip <- paste0(sam,".zip")
  dumpDir <- file.path(philipsFtp, samZip)
  destDir <- file.path(outDir,"zipfiles", paste0(basename(samZip)))
  if(file.exists(dumpDir)){
    if(!file.exists(file.path(outDir,samZip))){
      try(fs::file_copy(path=dumpDir,new_path=outDir),silent=T)
      unzip(zipfile=file.path(outDir,samZip))
    }
    cnvFi = file.path(outDir, sam, "aberration_cnv.csv")
    cnvInfo <- as.data.frame(readr::read_csv(cnvFi, col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character())))
  if(nrow(cnvInfo)>0){cnvTab <- parsePhilipsCn(cnvInfo,sam,cnvTab)}
  }
  return(cnvTab)
}

# Generates a new Sample Tabbed row in html
makeNewTab <- function(sam){
  message("Now creating ", sam, " tab")
  cat(paste("#", sam, "{.tabset}","\n\n"))
  currSam <- samList[samList$Test_Number==sam,"Specimen_ID"]
  currQC <- grepl(paste(currSam, collapse="|"), qcData$Sample)
  qcTab <- qcData[currQC,2:ncol(qcData)]
  return(qcTab)
}

# Generates a new Sample Tabbed row in html
makeMethTab <- function(sam, methCn){
  if (any(sam %in% methSams) == TRUE) {
    currRD <- methData$record_id[methData$Test_Number == sam]
    if (length(currRD) > 1) {
      message(sam, " has more than one methylation RD-number: ", currRD)
      message("Will create tab for each RD png file")
      for (rd in 1:length(currRD)) {
        rdTab <- paste0("Methylation", rd)
        makeDT(rdTab, methCn,pdfFi=NULL,currRD[rd],sam)}
    } else{makeDT("Methylation",methCn,NULL,currRD,sam)}
  } else{cat("## **No Methylation** \n\n")}
}

# Checks if the facets pdfs have been converted to png
if(!dir.exists(file.path(outDir,"cnvpng"))){convert.plots(samList)}
```
  
```{r, label='Table Output', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', error=FALSE, fig.keep='all', include=TRUE, fig.align="center", fig.cap="CNV plot", fig.show="asis", out.width = '140%',fig.width=15}  

checkCreate <- function(folderName){if(!dir.exists(folderName)){dir.create(folderName)}}

for (sam in samples) {
  qcTab <- makeNewTab(sam)
  makeDT("QC",qcTab)
  samRows <- snvDt$Test_Case==sam
  snvTab <- snvDt[samRows & snvDt$Variant=="SNV",]
  makeDT("SNV/INDEL",snvTab)
  cnvTab <- snvDt[samRows & snvDt$Variant=="CNV",]
  cnvTab <- checkDataDump(sam,cnvTab)
  makeDT("CNV",cnvTab, pdfFi=sam)
  methCn <- snvDt[samRows & snvDt$Variant=="Methylation",]
  if(nrow(methCn)==0) {methCn = NULL}
  makeMethTab(sam, methCn)
}
```
